Excluded 'Other Operating Expenses' because preview indicates it is primarily FX/non-business related rather than core SG&A overhead.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders

variables.notes: Using priority list semantics for BE. Prefer parent-only equity to exclude NCI; 'Total Equity' retained as fallback because labels may vary over time, though values shown are identical here.
No non-controlling interest/minority interest row appears on the balance sheet. Since BE uses the parent-only equity line, MIB is set to empty rather than flagged for manual review.
